message.content:
You are repairing an AsciiDoc procedural sub-spec to align it with sibling files for cross-spec consistency. Pure .adoc work, no code, no commits.

TARGET FILE:
/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbk/vov_veiled/RBSRL-retriever_roster.adoc

THREE REPAIRS TO LAND IN THIS FILE:

REPAIR A — Plural-attribute fix on line 4.

CURRENT line 4:
```
NOTE: This operation rosters {rbtr_retriever} {giam_service_account}s in the {rbtgi_depot_project} via per-SA fact-file emission.
```

REPLACE WITH (use the defined plural attribute `{giam_service_account_s}` instead of English-suffix plural):
```
NOTE: This operation rosters {rbtr_retriever} {giam_service_account_s} in the {rbtgi_depot_project} via per-SA fact-file emission.
```

REPAIR B — Repair the {buf_write_fact_multi} call description to be explicit about the three positional arguments and the empty-content invariant. The current form mis-states `value «IDENTITY»` which would put the identity into file content, contradicting RBS0:1119 "fact content is empty, presence-as-fact".

CURRENT step 4 "Emit Fact Per Discovered {rbtr_retriever}" body (around lines 39-44):
```
.. For each entry in `«RETRIEVER_ACCOUNTS»`:
... Derive `«IDENTITY»` by stripping the `${RBCC_role_retriever}-` prefix from `accountId` (the operator-typed name)
... {rbbc_call}
{buf_write_fact_multi}
with `<file_root>`, extension `RBCC_fact_ext_roster_retriever` (resolves to `roster-retriever`), and value `«IDENTITY»`
... Fact content is empty — basename presence is the assertion (RBS0:1119)
```

REPLACE WITH:
```
.. For each entry in `«RETRIEVER_ACCOUNTS»`:
... {rbbc_store}
`«IDENTITY»` by stripping the `${RBCC_role_retriever}-` prefix from the entry's `accountId`
... {rbbc_call}
{buf_write_fact_multi}
with three positional arguments:
.... `<file_root>`: composed as `<roster_subdir>/«IDENTITY»` (the basename root for the emitted fact file)
.... `<ext>`: `RBCC_fact_ext_roster_retriever` (resolves at source time to `roster-retriever`)
.... `<value>`: `""` (empty content — presence-as-fact convention per RBS0:1119)
```

(The step heading "*Emit Fact Per Discovered {rbtr_retriever}*:" remains unchanged.)

REPAIR C — Replace `//axhoc_completion` prose with parallel template (matches what RBSDR is being updated to).

CURRENT lines 51-54:
```
//axhoc_completion
Successful execution emits one fact file per discovered {rbtr_retriever} {giam_service_account},
keyed by operator-typed identity under the `RBCC_fact_ext_roster_retriever` extension.
The operation is read-only; no service accounts are created or modified.
```

REPLACE WITH (verbatim):
```
//axhoc_completion
Successful execution rosters {rbtr_retriever} service accounts via per-SA fact emission — one `roster-retriever` fact file per discovered identity.
The operation is read-only; no service accounts are created or modified.
```

CONSTRAINTS:
- Do NOT touch any other files. Do NOT make any commits.
- Preserve step 1 (Authenticate), step 2 (List Service Accounts), step 3 (Filter), and step 5 (Display Summary) unchanged.

After editing, report in 5 lines max:
1. Final line count
2. Confirmation: line 4 uses `{giam_service_account_s}` (plural attribute)
3. Confirmation: zero occurrences of "value `«IDENTITY»`" remain
4. Confirmation: //axhoc_completion uses the new parallel template
5. Any anomaly

content.text: Let me read the target file first.

content.content:
1	//axhob_operation
2	{rbtgo_retriever_roster}
3	
4	NOTE: This operation rosters {rbtr_retriever} {giam_service_account}s in the {rbtgi_depot_project} via per-SA fact-file emission.
5	Read-only observation: lists all service accounts, filters to retriever-prefixed accountIds, and emits one fact per discovered SA via {buf_write_fact_multi} against the `RBCC_fact_ext_roster_retriever` extension constant.
6	Fact content is empty (presence-as-fact); stdout assertion of individual identities is retired.
7	
8	//axhos_step
9	. *Authenticate as
10	{rbtr_governor}*:
11	.. Execute
12	{rbtoe_governor_authenticate}
13	.. {rbbc_store}
14	`«GOVERNOR_TOKEN»` for subsequent API calls
15	
16	//axhos_step
17	. *List Service Accounts*:
18	.. {rbbc_call}
19	link:https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.serviceAccounts/list[iam.projects.serviceAccounts.list] with:
20	... method: `GET`
21	... endpoint: `https://iam.googleapis.com/v1/projects/{rbtgi_depot_project}/serviceAccounts`
22	... header: `Authorization: Bearer «GOVERNOR_TOKEN»`
23	.. {rbbc_require}
24	HTTP 200 response
25	.. {rbbc_store}
26	`«ACCOUNTS»` from response `.accounts[]` array
27	
28	//axhos_step
29	. *Filter to
30	{rbtr_retriever}
31	Service Accounts*:
32	.. From `«ACCOUNTS»`, select entries whose `accountId` begins with `${RBCC_role_retriever}-`
33	.. {rbbc_store}
34	`«RETRIEVER_ACCOUNTS»` — the filtered set; per-role observation per BBAAQ contract
35	
36	//axhos_step
37	. *Emit Fact Per Discovered
38	{rbtr_retriever}*:
39	.. For each entry in `«RETRIEVER_ACCOUNTS»`:
40	... Derive `«IDENTITY»` by stripping the `${RBCC_role_retriever}-` prefix from `accountId` (the operator-typed name)
41	... {rbbc_call}
42	{buf_write_fact_multi}
43	with `<file_root>`, extension `RBCC_fact_ext_roster_retriever` (resolves to `roster-retriever`), and value `«IDENTITY»`
44	... Fact content is empty — basename presence is the assertion (RBS0:1119)
45	
46	//axhos_step
47	. *Display Summary*:
48	.. {rbbc_show}
49	count of emitted facts; no per-account stdout enumeration
50	
51	//axhoc_completion
52	Successful execution emits one fact file per discovered {rbtr_retriever} {giam_service_account},
53	keyed by operator-typed identity under the `RBCC_fact_ext_roster_retriever` extension.
54	The operation is read-only; no service accounts are created or modified.
55

content.text: Now I'll apply all three repairs.
